-        <button>Yes</button>
-        <button>No</button>
+        <button className="flex items-center mb-4 px-4 py-2 gap-3 bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-500 rounded border-2 border-green-400 transition-all text-white font-semibold">Yes</button>
+        <button className="flex items-center justify-center mb-4 px-4 py-2 gap-3 bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-500 rounded border-2 border-red-400 transition-all  text-white font-semibold">No</button>
       </form>
     </dialog>,
     document.getElementById("modal-root")!
   );
